reference: I had a zit-like pimple between my right testicle and my perineum, kind of in the scrotal area. It acted like a normal zit, releasing a mixture of pus and blood, and it emptied out practically when I popped it. However, it released an awful odor for a long time. I have had it for two days now. I woke up this morning and found the skin on my inner thigh near my genitals peeling off. What is going on?
text: I had a zit-like pimple between my right testicle and my perineum, kind of in the scrotal area. It acted like a normal cyst, released pus and blood, and it emptied out practically when I popped it. However, it released an awful odor for a long time. I have had it for two days now.
